name: @nuparu/wasm
description: WASM-powered Node API for the nuparu formatter.

scripts.build: cargo build -p nuparu-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/nuparu_wasm.wasm --out-dir dist --target web --no-typescript && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
